ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response is relevant and consistent with the persona but lacks some naturalness in phrasing due to being too controlled.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>The discount offer seems appropriate, though it's a bit abrupt and could be more contextually sensitive given the urgency of potion needs in this scenario.
